mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_teacher (course_id, teacher_id, teacher_name, teaching_class_id, is_main_teacher) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{teachingClassId}, #{isMainTeacher})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY course_id
SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE teaching_class_id = #{teachingClassId} ORDER BY is_main_teacher DESC, id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_teacher WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
